metadata.description: The Remembrance ecosystem as an installable Claude Code package: the Field Goggles (standing coding overlay), the seams/gaps wiring tools, and the Remembrance Oracle MCP field server.

plugins.name: remembrance-field
plugins.description: Remembrance Field Goggles + ecosystem infrastructure. The goggles are the main tool, active whenever you code: FOCUS (structure), META (resonance + nearest siblings), ECOSYSTEM CAPABILITIES (every relevant ecosystem function, right there), plus the field MCP server and seams/gaps commands.
